violations.text: Per interview of staff, blender bowls are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day when they are taken to the main cafeteria. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Milk was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the lowboy refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was relocated to another refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Blender bowls observed stored beneath the paper towel dispenser at the hand washing sink. Equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean dry location, where they are not subject to dust, splash or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor fan have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Coconut milk was observed held at 65 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
Food observed stored less than 6 inches from the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on surfaces that is not clean in areas of the establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The self service refrigerator was not in good repair, not holding food at proper temperature. All foods requiring refrigeration were relocated to other units. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the counter. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
